title: Daily Roaming from $7/day
description: Use your NZ plan's data, minutes and texts in Australia and the Pacific for a flat daily fee. You're only charged on the days you actually use it.
highlights: No charge on days you don't use it
Turn it on before you fly

title: Travel Packs for 60+ destinations
description: Heading to Asia, Europe or the Americas? Grab a data, minutes and text pack that lasts 30 days so you can travel without bill shock.
highlights: Add before or during your trip

title: Travel on an eSIM
description: Add a travel eSIM to a compatible phone and stay connected the moment you land — no plastic SIM, no queues.

title: Take your broadband with you
description: Tell us your new address and we'll move your Spark broadband across. In many homes you can be back online the same day.

title: Switch and bring your number
description: Moving to Spark is easy. Keep your existing mobile number and we'll handle the transfer, usually within a few hours.
highlights: Help every step of the way

title: Prepaid eSIM for visitors
description: Landing in New Zealand? Get connected before you arrive with a prepaid Visitor eSIM loaded with data, minutes and texts.
